MinDueDate.title: MinDueDate
MinDueDate.description: Stores the minimum due date across all invoices associated with the provided Account Id.

PendingAmount.title: PendingAmount
PendingAmount.description: Calculates the total pending amount due on the next payment date.

PendingInvoices.title: PendingInvoices
PendingInvoices.description: All the invoices that are pending on the next due date, formatted as text (e.g., INV-008, INV-009).
